title: Hello World
snippet: WelcomeHello Yall.ToDo: setup pingdef ping(host): param = '-n' if platform.system().lower()=='windows' else '-c' command = ['ping', param, '1', host] try: response = subprocess.call(command, stdout=subprocess.DEVNULL, stderr=subprocess.STDOUT) except Exception: print('Something went wrong!') return False if response == 0: #print('{} is Online'.format(host)) return True else: #print('{} is Offline'.format(host)) return False
